vocab.meaning: có mức giá cao hơn (do có ưu thế đặc biệt)
vocab.example: Although rooms with a sea view usually command a premium, I believe the visual experience is well worth the extra expense.

vocab.meaning: toàn cảnh đẹp đến nghẹt thở
vocab.example: Waking up to a breathtaking panorama of the city skyline is a luxury I try to afford whenever I travel to a new metropolis.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che khuất
vocab.example: I specifically requested a room on a higher floor to ensure an uninterrupted view of the mountain range.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: The aesthetic appeal of a picturesque landscape right outside my window significantly enhances my overall travel satisfaction.
A balcony overlooking a serene lake serves as a tranquil sanctuary where I can unwind after a long day of sightseeing.
From my hotel room's vantage point, I could observe the vibrant local life unfolding in the square below.
I love to order room service and just spend the whole morning soaking up the scenery from my private terrace.

vocab.meaning: ấn tượng mạnh về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: There is something profoundly relaxing about having a visually striking sunset as the backdrop to your evening.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn phong cảnh đẹp mắt
vocab.example: I always prioritize hotels that offer a scenic vista of the ocean to truly immerse myself in the holiday spirit.
Having a room with a natural view allows me to effectively recharge my batteries and escape the urban grind.
